title: 3 Kodiyum 300 Pavanum
subTitle: 3 Kodiyum 300 Pavanum

title: Akale
subTitle: A minister's daughter longs for the love of her father, who holds a grudge against her. However, his aide's support of her leads to a series of unexpected events.

title: Krishnagadha
subTitle: Identical twins, separated at birth, face a cruel twist when one is forced to marry into a cursed family, unknowingly sacrificing herself for her sister.

title: Manathe Kottaram
subTitle: Madhavan and Chandrika, a devoted middle-class couple, nurture their children while harbouring dreams of a new home. As they navigate life's challenges, they strive to secure their daughters' futures.

title: Kudumbasree Sharada
subTitle: Shattering the shackles of her past struggles and societal norms, a single mother successfully raises her three young daughters.

title: Mangalyam
subTitle: A young woman with big dreams gets married to a man from different background and culture and together, they face challenges and joys of life.

title: Aval Arundhati
subTitle: Arundhati's untimely death leaves her husband and four children devastated. In the midst of their grief, Parvati, the family's long-time caretaker, steps up to provide comfort and support.

subTitle: Watch a calming spiritual trance, hear devotional songs, and glimpse different Hindu gods worshipped by devotees nationwide, offering a peaceful glimpse into traditional devotion and culture.

subTitle: A reality show where kids aged 5-13 showcase their acting skills through fun tasks and challenges designed to groom their talent and boost their confidence.

title: Oru Murai Vanthu Paarthaya
subTitle: Prakashan, an electrical engineer, is in love with Aswathy, a village girl. However, his life takes an unexpected turn when Parvathy, a stranger, enters his life.

title: Chembarathi
subTitle: Ramadevi demands consequences for Kalyani after finding hair in her meal. Meanwhile, Aishwarya schemes to capture Arjun's interest during a dinner gathering.

title: Kick 2
subTitle: The story revolves around Robin Hood, son of Kalyan, who unlike his father prefers comfort to kick. When Robin comes to India to start a hospital, he meets Chaitra and falls in love with her. He follows her to her village in Bihar to find his kick.
